hero.headline: WHERE CHAMPIONS ARE MADE
hero.subline: Elite gymnastics training for children aged 3–16. FIG-certified coaches. Real results.

about.label: OUR PHILOSOPHY
about.headline: More Than Gymnastics — We Build Champions
about.body1: At Healy Gymnastics Academy, we believe every child has the potential to achieve greatness. Since 2013, we have been Kuwait's most trusted gymnastics institution, combining world-class coaching methodology with a nurturing, competitive environment.
about.body2: Our FIG-certified coaches bring over 70 combined years of international experience, developing athletes who compete on the national and international stage — while building confidence, discipline, and character that lasts a lifetime.
about.landmark: Located in the heart of Kuwait City, near Salmiya

toddler.name: Toddler Gymnastics
toddler.description: Introduce your little one to movement, balance, and coordination through fun, age-appropriate gymnastics activities. Building the foundation for a lifetime of athleticism.

recreational.name: Recreational Gymnastics
recreational.description: Our most popular program. Children develop flexibility, strength, and gymnastics skills in a fun and supportive environment. Classes run 3x per week.

competitive.name: Competitive Team
competitive.description: For dedicated athletes ready to compete. Training includes floor, vault, bars, and beam. Athletes represent Kuwait in national and regional competitions.

boys.name: Boys Artistic Gymnastics
boys.description: Specialised training for boys covering floor exercise, pommel horse, rings, vault, parallel bars, and horizontal bar. Building strength and precision.

rhythmic.name: Rhythmic Gymnastics
rhythmic.description: Combining gymnastics with dance and apparatus work (ribbon, hoop, ball, clubs). Develops elegance, coordination, and artistic expression.

adult.name: Adult Fitness Gymnastics
adult.description: Gymnastics-based fitness for adults. Improve flexibility, core strength, and body control. Evening classes available. No prior experience required.

competition.headline: HEALY ANNUAL COMPETITION
competition.body: Every year, Healy Gymnastics Academy hosts Kuwait's most prestigious gymnastics competition. Athletes from across the region compete in artistic and rhythmic gymnastics, watched by hundreds of families and judges. It is more than a competition — it is a celebration of excellence.

team.headline: THE COACHES BEHIND THE CHAMPIONS
team.subline: Our FIG-certified team brings world-class expertise to Kuwait

rabah.name: Coach Rabah
rabah.title: Head Coach & Founder
rabah.bio: Founder of Healy Gymnastics Academy with over two decades of international coaching experience. Trained athletes who have competed at Asian Games and Arab Championships. A visionary leader who built Kuwait's most prestigious gymnastics institution from the ground up.

haitham.name: Coach Haitham
haitham.title: Artistic Gymnastics Director
haitham.bio: International-level artistic gymnastics specialist with 18 years of coaching excellence. Former national team coach with expertise in vault, floor, and apparatus technique. Known for developing Kuwait's top competitive gymnasts.

ahmed.name: Coach Ahmed Khatab
ahmed.title: Boys Gymnastics Coach
ahmed.bio: Specialist in men's artistic gymnastics with 15 years of experience training athletes across all apparatus. Former competitive gymnast with international competition experience. Expert in strength conditioning and technique refinement.

saber.name: Coach Saber Ahmed
saber.title: Competitive Team Coach
saber.bio: Elite-level coach focused on developing Kuwait's competitive gymnastics pipeline. Specialises in floor exercise, tumbling, and competition preparation. Has coached multiple national champions in both artistic and rhythmic disciplines.

ghadeer.name: Coach Ghadeer
ghadeer.title: Rhythmic Gymnastics Coach
ghadeer.bio: Kuwait's foremost rhythmic gymnastics specialist with over a decade of coaching experience. Expert in all apparatus (ribbon, hoop, ball, clubs) and choreography. Developing the next generation of Kuwait's rhythmic gymnastics stars.

gallery.headline: IN ACTION
gallery.subline: Real moments from training, competitions, and celebrations

testimonials.headline: WHAT KUWAIT FAMILIES SAY
testimonials.subline: Trusted by thousands of families across Kuwait

items.quote: My daughter has been training at Healy for 3 years and the transformation is incredible. She went from a shy 6-year-old to a confident competitor. The coaches truly care about each child.
Best decision we ever made for our son. Coach Ahmed is exceptional — patient, knowledgeable, and genuinely invested in each athlete's development. He has won two regional medals this year!
We tried other gymnastics academies in Kuwait but Healy is on a completely different level. The facilities are world-class and the teaching methodology is outstanding. Highly recommended.

Coach Ghadeer is absolutely brilliant with rhythmic gymnastics. My daughter adores her and has improved dramatically in just 6 months. The annual competition was a wonderful experience for the whole family.
I enrolled my 3-year-old in the Toddler program and it exceeded all expectations. The coaches are so patient and make it incredibly fun. My son asks to go to gymnastics every day!
As an adult who had no gymnastics experience, I was nervous to start. The adult fitness classes are welcoming, challenging, and so much fun. I have improved my flexibility enormously in 4 months.

Healy has the best coaching staff I have ever seen. The attention to detail, the structured progression, and the genuine love for gymnastics shows in everything they do. My kids won't go anywhere else.
The annual competition was the most memorable day of my daughter's year. Coach Rabah and the entire team put on an incredible show. We are so proud to be part of the Healy family.
